finding_results.notes: Replaced the repeated 'She could hear' stem at all three cited beats with distinct sensory constructions (breath hitch, intrusive paternal voice, pen-on-pad friction) while preserving scene pressure and voice.

summary: Addressed the prose tic flagged in CH07-PRO-001 by eliminating repeated stem setup and diversifying auditory delivery without altering chapter continuity, tone, or heading contract.
